productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Surfs Up Black T-shirt
description: Style Note Inspired by the nautical life, this tee for your little man makes him look cute, without overtly cutesy details. The stripes add an interesting dimension to a kiddie tee, while he stays happy being his naughty self in this comfy piece! Product Details Black and white striped round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and print on the chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
